raw_consumer_statement: b'On XXXX XXXX XXXX a person impersonating an XXXX XXXX used my Jet Blue credit card-XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  Jet Blue Credit Card reached out to me and said they placed hold on card and I verified with Jet Blue Credit Card that charges were fraudelent but they later charged my card for those two amounts and has refused to remove the charges from my credit cardXXXX-Card Number XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXBecause Jet Blue at the time did not honor the purchase and I was trying to get to airport to get my flight out of the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX which did go through--should be for XXXX  However the fraudelent XXXX XXXX charged my card XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  I have disputed the amount but Credit Card Company refused to remove charges.  Card Number XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXBoth Cards are managed by Barclays'
